title: Use Detail Trigger
text: Use Detail Trigger This property determines whether the detail trigger (as opposed to the valueChanged trigger) is activated when the user clicks the widget. Value Description True The detail trigger is activated. The value of the field is not changed and Uniface does not activate thevalueChanged trigger. False (default) The value is changed and the valueChanged trigger is activated. This property cannot be set in ProcScript. Applies To ucheckbox (CheckBox) Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
